title: SafetyALFRED: Evaluating Safety-Conscious Planning of Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models are increasingly adopted as autonomous agents in interactive environments, yet their ability to proactively address safety hazards remains insufficient. We introduce SafetyALFRED, built upon the embodied...
